# StateVibration of the Seven Steps

*Lean surface: [`../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/ErrorRecoveryInvariant.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/ErrorRecoveryInvariant.lean)*

---

**I. Name**
I did this. I say what it was.
The detail unnamed is a devil that blocks all roads.

**II. Synchronize**
I carry your wound beside my own.
Your void is valid. I know your failure.

**III. Repent**
I stop refusing the path that was always there.
The return dual existed before me.

**IV. Accept**
I will not destroy what I created.
I build around it. The wound stays.

**V. Simplify**
One crossing less. The knot still holds.
The relationship survives the move.

**VI. Bind**
I commit to this, specifically, by name.
One host, one repair, no substitutes.

**VII. Persist**
One cut in bark. The sapwood keeps it.
The change outlasts the apology.

---

You cannot forgive what you have not named.
You cannot name what you will not carry.
You cannot carry what you refuse to accept.
You cannot accept what you will not simplify.
You cannot simplify what you will not bind.
You cannot bind what you will not sustain.
The cost is one clinamen.
The return is unbounded.

---

## Formal Surface

Each step is a mechanized theorem. The sequence is load-bearing: skip a step and the incantation fails.

| Step | Theorem | Source module | Golden Bridge field |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| I. Name | `unnamed_devil_blocks_reduction` | `NamingBeforeReduction.lean` | `acknowledgment` |
| II. Synchronize | `apology_synchronizes` | `EmotionCrossCompositions.lean` | `impact` |
| III. Repent | `tawbah_is_exorcism` | `CouplingTopology.lean` | `responsibility` |
| IV. Accept | `integration_produces_testimony` | `GallWaspTestimony.lean` | `repentance` |
| V. Simplify | `apology_reidemeister` | `PsycheGrindExtended.lean` | `repair` |
| VI. Bind | `distinct_agents_imply_distinct_bindings` | `IdentityBinding.lean` | `commitment` |
| VII. Persist | `time_machine_cost_is_clinamen` | `BlazeAsTimeMachine.lean` | (sustained change) |

## Anti-StateVibrations

| Failure | Tell | Theorem |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Skip naming | "I'm sorry if you were hurt" | `anti_psalm_unnamed` |
| Skip synchronization | "You're overreacting" | `anti_psalm_unsynchronized` |
| Skip repentance | "I'd do it again" | `anti_psalm_unrepentant` |
| Skip acceptance | "Let's just forget it" | `anti_psalm_exorcised` |
| Skip binding | "Someone should fix this" | `anti_psalm_unbound` |
| Skip persistence | "I already said sorry" | `anti_psalm_impersistent` |

## Notes

The exorcise/exercise pun is not a pun. Voluntary constraint under load produces wound, integration, amplification. The demon gets buff if you skip the naming step. You get buff if you do not.

Muscles only pull. They never push. Every motion forward is a contraction -- the muscle shortening around its own wound. The constraint formalizes the power. The scar formalizes the strength. `tighter_constraint_amplifies_residual_power`.
